seo_title: Pickleball | Los Cab Sports Club — 59 Lighted Courts in Fountain Valley
seo_description: Play pickleball at Los Cab — 59 lighted courts (43 dedicated + 16 hybrid), clinics, leagues, and open play in Fountain Valley, CA. Join today.
hero_subtitle: The largest pickleball facility in Orange County. 43 dedicated and 16 hybrid courts — all with new stadium lighting for evening play.

programs.title: Intro to Pickleball
programs.desc: New to the sport? Our intro clinics teach you the basics — rules, scoring, and fundamental techniques in a friendly, welcoming environment.

programs.title: Skill Development Clinics
programs.desc: Improve your dinking, third-shot drops, and court movement. Group clinics with certified pros designed to take your game to the next level.

programs.title: Competitive Training
programs.desc: Intensive training for 4.0+ players. Strategy, pattern plays, drilling, and tournament preparation with our top coaching staff.

programs.title: Youth Pickleball Academy
programs.desc: Structured youth programs designed to build confidence and skills in players ages 8–17. Fun, competitive, and educational.

programs.title: Leagues & Ladders
programs.desc: Join organized round-robin leagues and ladder competitions. Meet other players, track your progress, and compete regularly.

programs.title: Open Play & Drop-in
programs.desc: Jump in any time! Open play is available daily for members. Use Team Reach to coordinate games with other Los Cab players.

courts_title: The Premier Pickleball Facility in Orange County
courts_subtitle: With 59 total courts — more than any other club in OC — Los Cab is the destination for serious pickleball players.

court_features.title: New Stadium Lighting
court_features.text: All 59 courts feature brand-new lighting systems for perfect visibility during evening sessions.

court_features.title: Dedicated Pickleball Courts
court_features.text: 43 courts built exclusively for pickleball — optimal court dimensions, surfacing, and net heights.

court_features.title: Hybrid Courts
court_features.text: 16 additional courts convertible for both tennis and pickleball — maximizing your court availability.

court_features.title: Team Reach Integration
court_features.text: Connect with other members via Team Reach to organize games, track scores, and join group sessions.

membership_details: $200 initiation fee. Includes unlimited court access, open play, discounted clinics, and all Sports Membership benefits.
